title: Flasks
description: This mod adds 21 flasks with various additives from edible Minecraft items.
body:
# **Basic information**

Flasks - This mod adds 21 flasks with various additives from edible Minecraft items. Each flask with an additive has its own effect and its effect on the player. To make a flask with an additive, you need to craft a "Sevrial Transfuser", and then add the flask and charcoal for the reaction. The mod adds flasks with almost all edible items. The mod supports two languages - English and Russian.

# Screenshots
![All Flasks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/603f24cae20bf47b6fb83d2150dfaede48a01a11.png)
![Transfusion device](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d4d29cd5d17f38a3a27f7972c0aa19db58bd3e4_0.webp)
![Barrel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61fc2602b5aa090a3449e86edc049246b0a5f323.png)
# Recepts
![Flask Barrel ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9cdf0ad92243a8d904955dd1a86c267bd934b98.png)
![Sevrial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3157b3eb8ebf0e5c4f14b933505a9503500be2e3.png)
![Flask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ba49122b4505b3705e98cc2bd07edd18ec875a2.png)

**Instructions on how to make a flask with an additive:**
1. Add a flask to the first slot of the transfuser.
2. Add an edible item to the second slot.
3. Add coal to the third slot (regular, not wood).
4. Click the "Transfuse" button and wait for a reaction.
